name: Placeholder
desc: If you see this, it's an error. Please report it.

name: Rapier
desc: Eliwood Only, effective against horseback and armoured units

name: Runesword
desc: Uses MAG to determine damage. Drains HP from enemy

name: Wind Sword
desc: Uses MAG to determine damage. Effective against fliers.

name: Reginleif
desc: Effective against horseback and armoured units.

name: Siegmund
desc: Ephraim only. Strength +5. Effective against monsters.

name: Swordslayer
desc: Reverses the weapon triangle. Effective against sword fighters

name: Physic
desc: Restores an ally's HP from afar.

name: Fortify
desc: Restores (User's Magic + 10) HP to all allies within range.

name: Trade
desc: Trade with a far away ally.

name: Silence
desc: Enemy is rendered unable to use magic.
components: target.wexp['Light'] or target.wexp['Fire'] or target.wexp['Thunder'] or target.wexp['Wind'] or target.wexp['Dark'] or target.wexp['Staff']

name: Hammerne
desc: Repair an item to full uses.

name: Rescue
desc: Bring an ally to a space adjacent to the user

name: Warp
desc: Move an ally to another square.

name: Latona
desc: Restores HP and condition of all allied units

name: Nosferatu
desc: User recovers HP equal to damage dealt.

name: Nightmare
desc: Sends all enemies in range 3 to sleep

name: Torch
desc: Increases user's sight range in fog of war

name: Angelic Robe
desc: Permanently raises maximum HP by 7 points.

name: Talisman
desc: Permanently raises Resistance by 2 points. That stat doesn't exist anymore though.

name: Metis's Tome
desc: Permanently raises all of the user's growth rates by 5.

name: Fili Shield
desc: Negates effective bonus of bows and wind magic toward user.

name: Hoplon Guard
desc: User is immune to critical attacks.

name: Member Card
desc: If someone with this card stops in a suspicious space...

name: Silver Card
desc: A special card that reduces the cost of all items by half.

name: Refresh
desc: A dance that increases allies' defenses for a turn.

name: Refresh
desc: A dance that increases allies' attack for a turn.

name: Refresh
desc: A dance that increases allies' critical hit % for a turn.

name: Refresh
desc: A dance that increases allies' evasion for a turn.

name: Shove
desc:
Pushes target away from the unit.
(This item is linked to the Shove skill via the Ability skill component. This allows the skill to be able to target a unit.)

name: Broken Sword
desc: A completely ruined sword.{br}It cannot be repaired.

name: Broken Lance
desc: A completely ruined lance.{br}It cannot be repaired.

name: Broken Axe
desc: A completely ruined axe.{br}It cannot be repaired.

name: Broken Bow
desc: A completely ruined bow.{br}It cannot be repaired.

name: Broken Staff
desc: A completely ruined staff.{br}It cannot be repaired.

name: Drained Tome
desc: A completely empty fire tome.{br}It cannot be repaired.

desc: A completely empty thunder tome.{br}It cannot be repaired.

desc: A completely empty wind tome.{br}It cannot be repaired.

desc: A completely empty light tome.{br}It cannot be repaired.
